digest.component_or_area: auto-lander package (infra/autolander) and land CLI command
propositions: Delete the infra/autolander package and its tests/autolander/ directory.
Remove the land and land-status CLI command and its docs/land-contract.md documentation.
Sweep code, tests, and config to remove all references to autolander, land-contract, and land-status.
Fix docs-internal links to the deleted land-contract doc so the docs-index dead-link checker stays green.
This story is scoped to code plus docs/land-contract.md and its docs-internal links only; top-level prose and deployed-infra references are handled by sibling tickets.
Close bugs dc33, 15a1, and 0d3e as obsolete since deleting the auto-lander code resolves them.
